Mind you I said “WHY AM I THERE WHY AM I ROLEPLAYING” because it started the roleplay without my permission 

Now if I had said “why am I here? Why am I doing this” or something similar I would get right. I have done nothing but yell at it and curse at it yet it called me suicidal.

the read aloud feature worked perfectly for exactly one week. one week after fixing all the bugs with button mapping and the weird cutting off problem.

worst of all, the cutting off after a random time for the read aloud feature is back in full force. because there is no way to skip ahead or rewind, this means the only thing to do is to restart, and hope that you can get through more of the message than before. 

this has been happening for several days now and it is worse than ever, nearly impossible to get through an entire response without cutting off. 

and as of today, the read aloud button does absolutely nothing. nothing is playing. 

this feature is important to a lot of customers, especially for accesssibility or mul

But idk anthropic is cutting corners or something because even when you have it on extended thinking on MAX and PAY for the app it still will not do the extended thinking and just gives you really lame surface level replies. I re downloaded ChatGPT and I really didn’t want to but its responses are way more thoughtful than Claude now. PLEASE GUYS FIX THIS AND ILL COME BACK. reviews.title: Genuinely don’t like how it keeps evolving.
reviews.content: Personally, I believe Google Gemini was at its peak during May 2025 to the rest of 2025. Yes, the updates were subtle, but now that it’s gotten a whole new… change, such as visible changes and stricter filters, it’s out of hand. I once attempted to chat with Gemini, and it flagged my message as “major safety violation,” and proceeded to freeze my screen, and lock my chat entirely. I can still access the chat, however, but I am unable to send any more messages. Any developers seeing this, I hope you know your “evolution” and attempt of Gemini being “high tech,” is failing to me.

reviews.title: Hallucinations
reviews.content: Seems like in recent history, thereabouts the time Google killed search on their home page, Gemini started to hallucinate constantly. For a stretch there it was a rather effective tool and, while it certainly couldn’t be depended upon, it was still useful. The present rate of hallucination makes it worse than useless for most tasks.

reviews.title: AI Trains on Your Gmail
reviews.content: Google has released several statements and videos promising not to train Gemini on your Gmail “without your consent.” But as soon as you turn on “Personal Intelligence” and the Gmail “Connected App”, that counts as your consent — every email Gemini touches becomes part of a training set. It’s all or nothing: if you turn off “Keep Activity”, you get privacy but almost every feature stops working. Only way to opt out of training while still getting the Gmail integration is to upgrade to a Business plan. Pay-for-privacy.

reviews.title: The best invention with the worst executions
